summary: A clipped cable-news interview (Newsmax / 'Bianca Across the Nation') in which Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer touts the March jobs report ('178,000 new jobs, we blew it out of the water'). Standard split-screen talking-head with news lower-thirds and a scrolling chyron about Iran, no music or stylization. Out of scope: it is a lightly-clipped TV news interview, not youth-appeal produced spectacle.
notable_text: MARCH JOBS REPORT BEATS EXPECTATIONS; NEWSMAX; Bianca Across the Nation; DOL.GOV
